Zhang Ba ŚľĶťúł
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ba (ŚľĶťúł). Officer of Zhuge Jin, killed during failed invasion of Xianyang. Zhang Ba was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Ba lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
